title: Rohtasgarh Fort
tagline: Rohtasgarh Fort — heritage city of Bihar

overview.short: The Rohtasgarh or Rohtas Fort is located in the Son River valley, in the small town of Rohtas in Bihar, India.
overview.description: The Rohtasgarh or Rohtas Fort is located in the Son River valley, in the small town of Rohtas in Bihar, India.

topPlaces.name: Maghigawan
topPlaces.description: Maghigawan is a village in India, located in Rohtas District, Bihar. According to the 2011 census of India, it has a population of 1904 people.

topPlaces.name: Akbarpur, Rohtas
topPlaces.description: Akbarpur is a village in Rohtas block of Rohtas district, Bihar, India. Located on the bank of the Son river, a short distance east of the historic Rohtasgarh fort.

topPlaces.name: Banjari, Bihar
topPlaces.description: Banjari is a small town at the south-western tip of Bihar state, India. It is located on the Sone River, the largest of the Ganges' southern tributaries, in Rohtas district.

topPlaces.name: Deorikalan
topPlaces.description: Deorikalan is a census town in Palamu district in the state of Jharkhand, India.

items.note: Maghigawan is a village in India, located in Rohtas District, Bihar. According to the 2011 census of India, it has a population of 1904 people.
Akbarpur is a village in Rohtas block of Rohtas district, Bihar, India. Located on the bank of the Son river, a short distance east of the historic Rohtasgarh fort.
Banjari is a small town at the south-western tip of Bihar state, India. It is located on the Sone River, the largest of the Ganges' southern tributaries, in Rohtas district.
Deorikalan is a census town in Palamu district in the state of Jharkhand, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rohtasgarh Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rohtasgarh Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rohtasgarh Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Gaya International Airport (105 km) and the nearest railway station is Gaya Junction (111 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rohtasgarh Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rohtasgarh Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rohtasgarh Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Rohtasgarh Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rohtasgarh Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Maghigawan, Akbarpur, Rohtas, Banjari, Bihar, Deorikalan.
